name: All in One Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat in a large skillet. Remove from heat and drain any excess fat.
2. Add the onion, celery, and tomatoes to the skillet. Stir until well combined.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. Place a layer of shredded cabbage at the bottom of a greased 2-quart casserole dish.
5. Spoon over layers of the beef mixture, alternating with cabbage, finishing with a layer of cabbage on top.
6. Sprinkle bread crumbs evenly over the casserole.
7. Bake, uncovered, for 1 hour in the preheated oven.
8. Serve with fried potatoes or fresh bread and a light dessert.
